title: The Tall Target
writer: George Worthing Yates, Art Cohn, Daniel Mainwaring
actors: Dick Powell, Paula Raymond, Adolphe Menjou
plot: A New York City detective, traveling by train between New York and Baltimore, tries to foil an on-board plot to assassinate President-elect Abraham Lincoln before he reaches Baltimore to give a major pre-Inauguration speech in 1861.
